race.comment: BIG OPINION (8) went down narrowly as a firm favourite when resuming in the slow at Nowra. Was sent to town second up where he chased soundly into fifth. Peaking now and gets the key booking of Loy. Looks the one. NARCISSIST (2) knuckled down bravely to also resume a winner at the latest. Has to carry the big weight second-up but deserves respect. BEER BARON (15) hasn't won for a long time but looked to be back somewhere near his best last start when closing strongly into second at Goulburn. Strips fitter and is in the mix. BRIAL ROSE (13) returns and is a noted fresh performer. Trialled well in readiness and has peaks that measure up. VINOLASS (5) was good fresh but has been below her best in her last two. Wide draw testing but is worth keeping safe on best figures.
